## Summary
One-line summary of the change.

## Memory Impact
- Describe how this change preserves or improves user memory clarity.

## Privacy Check
- List any data surfaced, persisted, or shared. Confirm defaults are private.

## Local-First
- Confirm default storage/behavior is local/offline-first. If cloud sync is added, explain opt-in flow.

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows `JOURNEYOS_CONSTITUTION.md` principles
- [ ] Updated docs if necessary
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] 3-second comprehension for changed UI views
